global.description: The ad features a prominent offer for a food delivery app with a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting free delivery for food orders over $15.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: A bold, prominent text at the bottom stating 'Hungry? We got you Free delivery over $15' in a clear, readable font.
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you Free delivery over $15

elements.label: App logo
elements.description: The app name 'BiteRush' displayed at the top in a large, bold font, likely representing the brand.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A clear button at the bottom saying 'Install now' in a contrasting color to attract attention.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small badge at the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in a bold font, indicating a promotional offer.
